     The Numbers Business Report

Chaos Walking (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,287,908Details
International Box Office $13,784,261
Worldwide Box Office $27,072,169
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,439,748
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,897,510
Total $3,337,258
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Todd Hewitt lives on the distant planet of New World—a new hope for humanity until struck by “The Noise,” a virus which inflicts immersive visions of ones’ every thought. The cacophony drives many mad until Todd makes a hidden, silent discovery: there is a girl named Viola, who may be the key to unlocking New World’s many layered secrets. Together, the two unlikely companions are forced on a white-knuckle adventure into an unexplored planet—trying to escape and hide in an environment where all thought is heard, all movement seen—as they both discover the truth about the lives they left behind and the spectacular world they’ve learned to call home.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$3,775,350 (28.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.52 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,980 opening theaters/2,132 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $15,626,685

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 5th, 2021 (Wide) by Lionsgate
March 5th, 2021 (IMAX) by Lionsgate
International Releases: February 3rd, 2021 (Wide) (France)
February 24th, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
March 4th, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
March 4th, 2021 (Wide), released as Caos: El inicio (Mexico)
March 4th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
Video Release: April 2nd, 2021 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2653 (cert #52756), 10/28/2020)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Development Hell
Plot point: Fugitive / On the Run
Social setting: Dystopia, Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Time period setting: Near Future
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate, Quadrant Pictures, Allison Shearmur, 3 Arts Entertainment, TIK Films, Hercules Bron Creative Partnership
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Todd Hewitt lives on the distant planet of New World—a new hope for humanity until struck by “The Noise,” a virus which inflicts immersive visions of ones’ every thought. The cacophony drives many mad until Todd makes a hidden, silent discovery: there is a girl named Viola, who may be the key to unlocking New World’s many layered secrets. Together, the two unlikely companions are forced on a white-knuckle adventure into an unexplored planet—trying to escape and hide in an environment where all thought is heard, all movement seen—as they both discover the truth about the lives they left behind and the spectacular world they’ve learned to call home.
